title: Spanish Crumble Potatoes
description: A delicious and easy-to-make side dish. Spanish crumble potatoes are a twist on the classic potato dish, with a crunchy topping.

ingredients.name: xoaxing crumble topping
ingredients.notes: crumbly mixture of flour, butter, and spices

instructions: Grease a baking dish with olive oil.
Arrange the sliced potatoes in the dish.
Sprinkle the crumble topping over the potatoes.
Season with garlic powder and salt to taste.
If using cheese, sprinkle it over the potatoes.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the topping is golden brown.
